provider_layering.blocker_reason: same multi-response package problem as recent_form; no explicit atomic package manifest for fixture list plus per-fixture detail members

stage_split.identity_reconciliation: mixed in _resolve_cross_provider_identity and standings alias resolution

provider_layering.note: single-request operations have retained evidence, but no provider-operation capability quarantine or explicit extraction state

single-response bundle generation in src/bet/api_clients/espn.py and load_bundle_manifest/load_evidence_object_bytes verification in src/bet/integration/evidence.py

connector_lifecycle.declared_capability_scope: implicit in method names and league mapping

connector_lifecycle.access_auth_check: missing key only; no cheap capability probe

search for has_more/cursor/truncation returns no provider-layer pagination metadata in src/bet

final_analysis_consumer.proof: build_safety_input_from_db issues direct team_form SQL and StatsRepo reads; no snapshot function call exists in scripts/ or src/ consumers

missing_projection_fallback.proof: src/bet/stats/enrichment.py:53 says caller should fall back to global team_form when projection missing; current production consumer already bypasses projections entirely

stat_key_distinctness.proof: src/bet/stats/enrichment.py:88-111 indexes payload by stat_key; tests/football/test_truthful_closure_regressions.py:106-140 proves corners and shots stay distinct

standings_scope.proof: src/bet/stats/enrichment.py:1837-1853 has real fixture/team scope when IDs provided but compatibility fallback reconstructs scope from competition_name + kickoff + first home team

source_native_ids_evidence_in_final_obje.proof: build_safety_input_from_db returns only sport/team/competition/markets; no source, native IDs, valid_at, or evidence bundle fields survive into generate_market_matrix output

odds_boundary.proof: scripts/generate_market_matrix.py loads odds from load_espn_odds_snapshot/load_odds_api_snapshot/load_multi_source_odds separately from safety analysis; enrichment code never carries odds

schema_and_temporal.observation_uniqueness: fixture_capability_observation unique index on canonical_fixture_id, team_id, capability, source, request_identity, evidence_bundle_id, valid_at, payload_sha256
schema_and_temporal.projection_uniqueness: fixture_capability_projection unique index on canonical_fixture_id, team_id, capability, analysis_cutoff_at
schema_and_temporal.dedupe_behavior: save_observation returns existing row id for identical identity and creates new row for changed evidence
schema_and_temporal.selection_history: no separate history table; only current projection row remains
schema_and_temporal.foreign_keys: enabled in init_db, discovery bootstrap, and get_db
schema_and_temporal.atomic_snapshot_run_boundary: not present; no enrichment_run table or multi-capability publish transaction boundary
schema_and_temporal.concurrent_run_protection: not present; enrich_fixtures runs sequentially only within one process and StatsRepo warns about concurrent writers
schema_and_temporal.target_future_exclusion: present in API team fixture results via kickoff_dt < cutoff_dt filtering
schema_and_temporal.last_n_ordering_after_filtering: present via finished.sort(... reverse=True) after temporal filtering in api_football.get_team_last_fixtures_result
schema_and_temporal.historical_default_reachability: present via params = {'team': team_id, 'season': season_id or '2024'} in api_football.get_team_last_fixtures_result
schema_and_temporal.team_form_cutoff_column: absent; disposable schema inspection shows no analysis_cutoff_at in team_form

f01_f25.direct_proof: VALID_EMPTY is absent and source result lives in base_client instead of the contract path src/bet/integration/source_result.py
f01_f25.finding: canonical source-result contract is still incomplete even though ESPN/API-Football enum compatibility has already been aligned
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: one production SourceResultStatus includes VALID_EMPTY and is imported by all football providers

f01_f25.direct_proof: plan/subscription payload keywords map to AUTHENTICATION_ERROR with error_code provider_plan_restricted
f01_f25.finding: explicit provider-plan restriction is still conflated with authentication failure
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: provider plan/data-range denial returns PLAN_RESTRICTED and remains fallback-visible

f01_f25.direct_proof: season parameter defaults to 2024 when season_id is absent
f01_f25.finding: historical default can reach football recent-form enrichment whenever current season is unresolved

f01_f25.direct_proof: observation identity includes evidence bundle and payload hash; regression test proves changed evidence creates a new row

f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: identical evidence dedupes, changed evidence appends

f01_f25.direct_proof: normalized payload is stored in payload_json and returned through get_snapshot_for_analysis
f01_f25.finding: normalized payload is durably stored on the fixture capability path, though the production consumer still bypasses it
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: downstream reads payload from immutable snapshot/projection instead of recomputing or using team_form

f01_f25.direct_proof: reader returns stat-specific payload fields and tests prove non-UNKNOWN values for corners and shots
f01_f25.finding: fixture snapshot reader no longer returns metadata-only on the exercised path
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: stat-key lookup returns selected normalized values when a projection exists

f01_f25.direct_proof: compatibility fallback synthesizes scope from competition_name + kickoff and chooses home_team_id from first matching fixture

f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: standings consumers must require canonical_fixture_id and team_id

f01_f25.direct_proof: current consumer builds football analysis from team_form and direct H2H rows
f01_f25.finding: global team_form remains on the actual football production path
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: football analysis consumes only fixture-scoped snapshot values

f01_f25.direct_proof: focused regressions pass, but there is no full offline replay/certification bundle proof for the new vertical in this phase
f01_f25.finding: prior E2E/replay/idempotency/certification evidence is still incomplete for contract certification
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: replay, idempotency, and certification can be reproduced from retained evidence without network

f01_f25.direct_proof: root still contains .env plus generated zip/report artifacts such as FOOTBALL_GOLDEN_FINAL_CERTIFICATION_BUNDLE.zip and review bundles
f01_f25.finding: repository hygiene issue remains visible and must be handled outside this no-production-code phase
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: active tree and authored artifacts contain no live secrets or generated certification clutter

f01_f25.direct_proof: projections are published per capability row with no enrichment_run or atomic snapshot publication boundary across all capability writes
f01_f25.finding: no atomic run/snapshot publication unit is modeled
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: downstream can observe only COMPLETE immutable snapshots tied to one run boundary

f01_f25.direct_proof: only in-process sequential execution is used; repository warns about concurrent writers and no lease/idempotency guard exists
f01_f25.finding: duplicate-live-request protection is unproved across concurrent runs
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: two identical concurrent runs produce one logical upstream request set and one published snapshot

f01_f25.direct_proof: providers share implementation families but there is no provenance-family/independence model in selection or certification data
f01_f25.finding: independence for fallback/certification cannot currently be expressed
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: provider qualification records provenance family and independence relationships per provider-capability scope

f01_f25.direct_proof: payload_json and parser_version exist, but normalized DTO version is not a separate governed contract field
f01_f25.finding: normalized provider payload versioning is implicit and parser-only
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: observation rows persist explicit normalized DTO version alongside parser version

f01_f25.direct_proof: freshness uses team_form age; negative cache is absent; lifecycle statuses differ per provider and are not formalized at routing boundary
f01_f25.finding: freshness, negative cache, and lifecycle policy remain implicit
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: capability configs define freshness windows, negative-cache rules, and lifecycle semantics explicitly

f01_f25.direct_proof: team_form, match_stats, fixture_capability_observation, and projection all key on team_id/fixtures/teams; no generic participant subject exists
f01_f25.finding: current persistence is not reusable for athlete-vs-athlete sports without redesign
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: generic subject references exist without requiring team-specific columns

f01_f25.direct_proof: evidence objects/manifests are written and verified, but there is no retention/reference table or GC safety contract for referenced objects
f01_f25.finding: evidence lifecycle safety is file-based only and undefined for cleanup
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: package revisions and referenced objects have explicit retention and missing-object failure semantics

f01_f25.direct_proof: telemetry records raw url and scope_id directly; no label-cardinality guard exists

f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: metrics/tracing use bounded provider-operation labels and keep fixture IDs out of metric dimensions

f01_f25.direct_proof: no generic subject_ref or participant-style FK layer exists; only teams/fixtures foreign keys are enforced

f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: generic subject reference tables enforce subject type and FK integrity

f01_f25.direct_proof: idempotent evidence/object writes exist, but there is no crash-safe lease or run journal proving exactly-once upstream request semantics across process failure
f01_f25.finding: crash recovery may duplicate upstream work even if durable rows later dedupe
f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: crash after evidence or before snapshot publication preserves history without duplicate logical requests

f01_f25.acceptance_assertion: quota and circuit state are shared and enforced consistently across processes and provider operations

reference_pattern_fit.finding: raw evidence objects and manifests already exist, but package revision/member completeness and DB visibility boundaries do not
transport and parsing are still mixed inside provider methods; P02 should isolate transport result -> bytes -> canonical parse
native IDs survive in some payloads/fixture_sources but not via one unified generic subject model
need only a tiny internal protocol for capability scope, pagination, truncation, and extraction state; no external framework
current code distinguishes some breaking schema failures, but additive drift versus scope-local quarantine is not modeled
contracted football path is API-first and current consumer does not require scrapers as sole truth; scraper paths remain separate/legacy
source health and scheduled ingestion ideas fit, but adding a new microservice would be overengineering

p02_minimal_slice.summary: minimal shared foundation only; no provider live work, no routing, no ontology

new_tables: subject_ref(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, subject_type TEXT, team_id INTEGER NULL, athlete_id INTEGER NULL, canonical_name TEXT, UNIQUE(subject_type, team_id, athlete_id))

evidence_package_revision(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, package_id TEXT UNIQUE, source_key TEXT, operation_name TEXT, request_identity TEXT, parser_version TEXT, dto_version TEXT, revision_hash TEXT, member_count INTEGER, completeness_state TEXT, created_at TEXT)

capability_selection_history(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, canonical_fixture_id INTEGER, team_id INTEGER, capability TEXT, analysis_cutoff_at TEXT, selected_observation_id INTEGER, selected_source TEXT, selected_status TEXT, recorded_at TEXT)
analysis_snapshot_run(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, canonical_fixture_id INTEGER, analysis_cutoff_at TEXT, status TEXT, snapshot_hash TEXT, created_at TEXT, published_at TEXT)
column_changes: fixture_capability_observation add dto_version TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'
fixture_capability_observation add evidence_package_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
fixture_capability_projection add snapshot_run_id INTEGER REFERENCES analysis_snapshot_run(id)

compatibility_behavior_for_current_footb: keep team_form and current projection reads working during P02
mirror existing bundle_id into evidence_package_id where available
default dto_version to '1' for current stored payloads
do not cut over generate_market_matrix in P02
p02_minimal_slice.exit_gate: source-result contract canonicalized, evidence package revisions durable, generic subject ref exists, append-only observation/versioning preserved, selection history durable, immutable snapshot publication boundary migrated and focused tests pass
p02_minimal_slice.size_estimate: medium (6-8 touched files, 1 additive migration, <=6 focused tests)
p02_minimal_slice.rollback_risk: low_to_medium; additive schema only, compatibility defaults retained, no downstream cutover in P02
